en: Warm and worn, have an or sound in the middle. Warm, worn. And the final word has an er sound.
ko: warm과 worn은 중간에 or 소리가 있어. Warm,
ja: warmとwornは真ん中にorの音があります。最後の単語はerの音です。

en: Worm, worm. Warm, worn, worm. Subscribe for more English lessons.
